projects.title: Humanoid Robot
projects.hook: 7 kg bipedal from scratch — BLDC motors, ODrive controllers, and a trained RL policy.
projects.summary: Architected a 7 kg, 20 DoF bipedal robot with GIM6010-8 BLDC motors, ODrive controllers, CAN bus communication, and an NVIDIA Isaac Sim digital twin. Currently working through sim-to-real transfer.

projects.title: AI Interview Coach
projects.hook: An AI interviewer you talk to out loud — it sees your screen while you code. In pre-launch testing.
projects.summary: A voice-based mock-interview web app: real spoken conversation with an AI interviewer that watches your screen, asks from a curated question bank, and scores you with a written debrief and session recording. Currently in pre-launch testing — I'm the first user.

projects.title: Polymarket Whale Tracker
projects.hook: Real-time pipeline that tracks prediction-market whales and maps their bets to equivalent Kalshi markets.
projects.summary: A live 11-service system that watches whale bets on Polymarket, builds track records for their wallets, and finds the matching market on Kalshi — self-hosted and running 24/7.

projects.title: Battle Bots
projects.hook: Led a team to the quarterfinals of Texas Robo Rumble with a vertical spinner.
projects.summary: Competed in Texas Robo Rumble twice as team lead, designing both the chassis and electrical system for a vertical spinner. Made it to the quarterfinals in year two.

projects.title: Route Genie
projects.hook: AI-generated Kilter Board routes sent over Bluetooth. Built in 24 hours at HackTx 2025.
projects.summary: Website that uses Gemini 2.5-Flash to generate custom climbing routes for the Kilter Board and send them via Bluetooth. Built in 24 hours at HackTx 2025.

projects.title: Spinza Pizza Website
projects.hook: A fast, mobile-first site for a pizza shop in Indonesia — every order button drops you straight into WhatsApp.
projects.summary: Designed and built a marketing and menu website for Spinza, a small pizza company on Gili Trawangan, Indonesia. Mobile-first, WhatsApp-based ordering, a tabbed data-driven menu, and a bold hand-spun brand identity — built to bring them more business.

projects.title: Servo Controlled Glider
projects.hook: Remote-controlled foam glider steered by underwing servos. No propellers — won 1st place.
projects.summary: Built a remote-controlled foam glider using two ESP32s (ESP-NOW wireless) and underwing servos for steering. No propellers allowed by school policy. Won 1st place in the staff competition.

projects.title: TIW 1 — Handheld Console
projects.hook: DS-inspired handheld built on Raspberry Pi Zero with custom 3D-printed enclosure and buttons.
projects.summary: Designed a Nintendo DS-inspired handheld game console around a Raspberry Pi Zero with custom 3D-printed enclosure, perfboard buttons, and GPIONext for input handling.

projects.title: MSPM0 Handheld Console
projects.hook: A breadboard handheld game console written in C on TI's MSPM0G3507 microcontroller.
projects.summary: Built a handheld game console on a breadboard around TI's MSPM0G3507 microcontroller, written entirely in C. A color LCD, button inputs, and the game logic all run bare-metal on the MSPM0 LaunchPad — the final project for EE 319K.

projects.title: Electric Skateboard
projects.hook: The electric board I designed and ride to class every day.
projects.summary: Custom drop-down electric skateboard with 100 mm hub motors, Loaded Longboard Zee brackets, TPU enclosures, and silicone-dipped ESC. Designed for portability, low deck height, and daily use.

projects.title: 2×4 Macropad
projects.hook: Custom RP2040 macropad with wire-matrix wiring, resin keycaps, and 3D-printed enclosure.
projects.summary: Built a 2×4 macropad with a Raspberry Pi Pico, custom resin keycaps, and wire-matrix button wiring. SLA-printed keycaps required to fit non-standard switch stems.
